name: no-sdr
description: Multi-user WebSDR server for RTL-SDR dongles — real-time waterfall, stereo FM, AM/SSB/CW, digital mode decoding

scripts.dev: npm run build --workspace=shared && npm run build:client && concurrently --raw -k "npm run dev:go" "npm run dev --workspace=client"
scripts.dev:demo: npm run build --workspace=shared && npm run build:client && concurrently --raw -k "npm run dev:go:demo" "npm run dev --workspace=client"
scripts.dev:go: cd serverng && STATIC_DIR=../client/dist CONFIG_PATH=../config/config.yaml go run -tags opus ./cmd/serverng
scripts.dev:go:demo: cd serverng && STATIC_DIR=../client/dist CONFIG_PATH=../config/config.yaml NODE_SDR_DEMO=1 go run -tags opus ./cmd/serverng
scripts.dev:legacy: npm run build --workspace=shared && concurrently --raw -k "npm run dev --workspace=server" "npm run dev --workspace=client"
scripts.dev:legacy:demo: npm run build --workspace=shared && concurrently --raw -k "npm run dev:demo --workspace=server" "npm run dev --workspace=client"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=shared && npm run build:client && npm run build:go
scripts.build:go: cd serverng && CGO_ENABLED=0 go build -ldflags="-s -w" -o bin/serverng ./cmd/serverng
scripts.build:go:opus: cd serverng && go build -tags opus -ldflags="-s -w" -o bin/serverng ./cmd/serverng
scripts.build:go:full: cd serverng && go build -tags "opus rtlsdr" -ldflags="-s -w" -o bin/serverng ./cmd/serverng
scripts.build:legacy: npm run build --workspace=shared && npm run build --workspace=client && npm run build --workspace=server
scripts.clean: rimraf shared/dist server/dist client/dist serverng/bin node_modules/.cache shared/tsconfig.tsbuildinfo server/tsconfig.tsbuildinfo
